findings: Q04_020_05 (mp_rt_extensions): 有每核 cpu 结构但未发现显式的处理器亲和性、负载均衡或实时调度扩展，标记为 yes_weak

metadata.summary: 查证了 xv6-k210 的上下文切换实现（swtch.S/swtch）、保存/恢复的寄存器集合（ra, sp, s0-s11），以及调度切换路径上的页表切换（w_satp/sfence.vma）。
metadata.raw_output_excerpt:
Now I have all the evidence. Let me compile the final structured JSON output.

    },
    {
      "fact_id": "Q04_003_03",
      "status_or_value": "yes_strong",
      "evidence_candidate_indexes": [2, 3, 4, 5],
      "notes": "scheduler() 中设置 tmp->state = RUNNING, c->proc = tmp；sched() 中保存浮点寄存器、更新 stime；yield() 中设置 timer 并重新插入 runqueue。"
    },
    {
      "fact_id": "Q04_003_04",
      "status_or_value": "yes_strong",
      "evidence_candidate_indexes": [1, 2, 6],
      "notes": "struct proc 包含 parent/child/sibling_next/sibling_pprev 父子关系字段；clone() 设置 np->parent = p 并维护兄弟链表。"
    },
    {
      "fact_id": "Q04_003_05",
      "status_or_value": "yes_strong",
